sop_sections.title: Objective
sop_sections.content: To lay down a procedure for the preparation, review/revision and distribution of Standard Operating Procedure.

sop_sections.title: Scope
sop_sections.content: This SOP is applicable to prepare, review/revise and distribute standard operating procedure.

sop_sections.title: Responsibility
content: Departmental Designee: To prepare new SOP as per specified format.
Departmental Head: To review the SOP.
QA Designee: To control the SOP as per the procedure.
QA Head: To approve the SOP.

sop_sections.title: Accountability
sop_sections.content: Concerned departmental head and QA head are accountable for SOP compliance.

subsections.title: All SOP's must be written on A4 size stationary with font size 12 of Roman.
subsections.content: Page setup: Top 1.0, Bottom 1.0, Left 1.0, Right 1.0, Header 1.0, Footer 0.5 inch.

subsections.title: All SOPs shall have the following sub-headings.
subsections.content: Objective, Scope, Responsibility, Accountability, Procedure, Reference, Format For Reporting, History.

subsections.title: Header and Footer of SOP
subsections.content: Refer Annexure-I for the template of SOP.

sop_sections.title: Reference
sop_sections.content: Regulatory guidelines and internal quality manual.

sop_sections.title: History
sop_sections.content: Revision details maintained in revision history table.
